description_long: This object is a robust, upright stone marker with a broad rectangular base and a slightly tapered, arched top. The surface is textured with visible cracks and weathering, giving it an aged, worn appearance. The front face features engraved text, including 'R.I.P' and faint, partially eroded lines below, suggesting it serves a commemorative or boundary function. The stone is a light gray color with darker veins and patches, typical of granite or marble, and the edges are slightly beveled. The rear and sides are plain, with the same cracked stone texture but no inscriptions. Its solid construction and weight indicate it is designed to be a permanent fixture in outdoor urban environments.
description: A weathered, upright stone marker with engraved text on the front, light gray in color with visible cracks and a broad rectangular base.
description_view_0: The rear view shows the plain, cracked stone surface with no inscriptions, highlighting the beveled edges and the arched top.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the thickness of the stone and the depth of the base, with visible surface cracks but no engravings.
description_view_2: The front view displays the engraved 'R.I.P' and faint additional text, along with the most prominent weathering and surface detail.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the stone's thickness, base, and surface cracks without any inscriptions.
attribute_location: Typically placed at the edge of urban sidewalks, near street corners, or at the entrance to driveways or historical sites to prevent vehicle encroachment or mark boundaries.
attribute_installation_orientation: Meant to be fully above ground, standing upright on its broad base, sometimes partially embedded for stability.
attribute_wear_patterns: Visible surface cracks, chipping along the edges, and general surface erosion likely caused by prolonged exposure to weather, occasional vehicle contact, and environmental pollutants. The front face shows more pronounced wear, especially around the engraved text, due to rainwater runoff and possible human touch.
attribute_historical_markings: Engraved text on the front face, including 'R.I.P' and faint, partially eroded lines below, in a simple serif style.
